title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services! We are hiring a Digital Marketing Manager for our Hyderabad team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services:
Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Conduct competitor analysis and market benchmarking
• Create engaging content for product pages and social media
• Build and maintain affiliate and influencer marketing programs
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Track key performance indicators including GMV, conversion rate, and ROI

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Diploma or Degree in Hospitality Management
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in WooCommerce
• Proficiency in Google Analytics
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Data Analytics
• Proficiency in MS Excel
• Proficiency in CRM Software

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Flexible working hours
• Work-from-home flexibility
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Hyderabad, Telangana, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Dishis Designer Jewellery Holdings Services!
